title: Slovakian Mars Bar Baked Bake
description: A sweet and decadent dessert inspired by Slovakian traditions, featuring a gooey Mars bar center.

ingredients.name: bar
ingredients.notes: for pressing down on the dough

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Place the broken Mars bar pieces in the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the dough over the Mars bar, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a bar to press down on the dough and create a decorative edge.
Place the bake on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the Mars bar is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
